preview.summary: The pump was failing every 40 hours of operation. Standard radiators were ineffective due to space constraints.

analysis.title: Contradiction
analysis.text: Object: Pump housing. If we increase the cooling surface, the pump won't fit in the niche. If we leave it as is — it overheats.

analysis.title: TRIZ Method
analysis.text: Applied the principle of 'Changing Aggregate State'. Instead of air cooling, a thermal tube with liquid was installed.

analysis.title: Result
analysis.text: The service life was increased 10-fold. The temperature stabilized at 45°C.
